mapper.select: select dep_id, dep_name from department where delete_flg = false order by dep_id
select product_id, product_style_name, product_name from product where delete_flg = false order by product_style_name,product_name

select st.user_id, st.user_name, pro.process_id, pro.process_name, pro.unit_price, pro.cost_time, pd.product_id, pd.product_style_name, pd.product_name, prpt.use_date, prpt.use_num, dt.dep_name, dt.dep_id from piece_rate_pay_total prpt inner join student st on prpt.user_id = st.user_id and st.delete_flg =false inner join product pd on pd.product_id = prpt.product_id and pd.delete_flg =false inner join process pro on pro.product_id = prpt.product_id and pro.process_id = prpt.process_id and pro.delete_flg = false left join department dt on dt.dep_id = st.dep_id and dt.delete_flg = false where prpt.delete_flg = false
and st.user_name like CONCAT('%',#{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and prpt.use_date >= CAST(#{useDateFrom} AS DATE)
and prpt.use_date <= CAST(#{useDateTo} AS DATE)
and dt.dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and pd.product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
order by st.user_id,prpt.use_date,pd.product_id,pro.process_id

select prpt.piece_id, prpt.user_id, prpt.product_id, prpt.process_id, prpt.use_date, prpt.use_num, st.user_name from piece_rate_pay_total prpt inner join student st on st.user_id = prpt.user_id and st.delete_flg = false where prpt.delete_flg = false and prpt.piece_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into piece_rate_pay_total ( user_id, product_id, process_id, use_date, use_num, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{processId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CAST(#{useDate} AS DATE), #{useNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update:
update piece_rate_pay_total
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
process_id = #{processId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_num = #{useNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_date = CAST(#{useDate} AS DATE),
update_date_time = current_timestamp
where piece_id = #{pieceId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and delete_flg = false

update piece_rate_pay_total
delete_flg = true, update_date_time = current_timestamp
where piece_id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false
mapper.select: select process_id, process_name from process where delete_flg = false and product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
select user_id from student where delete_flg = false and user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
